hero.subtitle: Your net café for PS5 and PC gaming. LED vibes, great gear.

games.title: Games
games.subtitle: Play on our consoles and high-end PCs.
games.ps5Desc: Big screens, comfy seats. FC 26, Fortnite, God of War, Spider-Man, and more.
games.pcsDesc: Ready for League of Legends, Valorant, CS2, and any title you want to run.
games.steeringWheelSubtitle: Race with a full setup on selected stations.
games.steeringWheel: Steering wheel available for Forza, Dirt, WRC, F1, and other racing games. Ask at the counter to use a station with wheel and pedals.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: More than a net café — your gaming spot.
about.p1: Peak Gaming is built for players who want great hardware and a chill place to play. We run 5 PS5 setups and 9 gaming PCs so you can jump into your favorite games without waiting.
about.p2: Whether you're here for a quick session or a long grind, we keep the space clean, cool, and focused on gaming. Come solo or with friends — we're here to make sure you have a good time.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Find us and get in touch.

reservation.title: Reservation
reservation.subtitle: Choose your station, date, and time. Open 12:00 – 24:00.
reservation.signInToReserve: Sign in to make a reservation.
reservation.thenVerifyPhone: Then you’ll verify your phone number (Step 2) to complete your account.
reservation.signInNotConfigured: Google sign-in is not configured. Set NEXT_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID in .env.local.
reservation.verifyPhoneToComplete: Enter your phone number and we’ll send you a code to verify it.

errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.authNotConfigured: Sign-in is not configured. Please contact us.
errors.authInvalid: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.authInvalidCredential: Google sign-in failed. Please try again.
errors.smsNotConfigured: SMS verification is not configured. Please contact us.
errors.smsSendFailed: Failed to send verification code. Please try again.
errors.emailRequired: Email is required to make a reservation.
errors.reservationDeleteFailed: Failed to delete reservation. Please try again.
errors.reservationFetchFailed: Failed to load reservations. Please refresh.

validation.mustBeSignedIn: You must be signed in to make a reservation.
validation.advanceBooking: Reservations must be made at least {hours} {unit} in advance.
validation.nameTooLong: Name must be at most {max} characters.
